scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev --workspace apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run dev:prepare && npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && concurrently -n api,web -c red,cyan "npm run dev --workspace apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
